title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
note: The RPG yardstick — even the side quests are full-blown stories. My all-time favorite.

title: God of War Ragnarök
note: Norse myth, brutal and tender — a father-and-son saga with the best-feeling combat I've played.

title: The Last of Us Part II
query: The Last of Us Part II
note: The benchmark for storytelling in games — it wrecked me, in the best way.

title: Detroit: Become Human
note: Branching android futures where every choice actually mattered.

title: Pragmata
note: Capcom's lunar sci-fi mystery — and it absolutely delivered.

title: Battlefield 6
note: All-out warfare, back to its loud, chaotic best.

title: Rainbow Six Siege
note: The squad-based tac-shooter I keep coming back to.

title: EA SPORTS FC 26
note: The daily fix — Ultimate Team and Weekend League grind.
